subject: Gaming
title: Escapism: Running Toward Something
description: One-minute skill: Escapism: Running Toward Something.

hook.text: Escapism sounds negative. But psychologists say healthy escapism is essential for mental wellbeing.

buildup.text: Games transport you to other worlds. That detachment from reality provides psychological recovery.

discovery.text: Studies show that moderate gaming after stressful work days improves mood and reduces burnout symptoms.

twist.text: But escapism becomes harmful when it replaces real-life coping. The line is thin and personal.

climax.text: Healthy escapism is running toward a fun experience. Harmful escapism is running away from problems.

punchline.text: Escape to recharge, not to hide. The difference matters.

quiz.question: When does gaming escapism become harmful?
options: When it replaces real-life coping instead of providing recovery
Whenever you play for more than an hour
